title: True Evangelion Speculation Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: True Evangelion Speculation (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 12:35 am Hey everyone. I noticed a lot of posts and topics imply this but I wanted to make this an official thread. Anyone wanna have fun giving their speculations on what the True Evangelion that's been mention will look/be like? We've all experience the godly powers that are unleased with 3I. To be more specific, what does everyone think will need to be done in order to "create" the TE?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Apr 25, 2011 1:27 am I said in another thread that I thought the TE may represent a state of being more than a specific Evangelion. That is, the state of being required to bring about Third Impact. So at the end of 2.X, Unit-01 is the "True Eva", but another unit could also be the TE if it is invested with that power.

[]:             Quote Post by Evabean » Mon Apr 25, 2011 1:33 am i was under the assumption that the mark.06 was the true evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 11:01 am From what I understood from the talk between Keele and Gendo, the Mark 06's completion will usher in the true evangelion. So the Mark 06 is also a tool used to bring about an even greater power. They said they still need to perform the necessary ceremonies, which we know from EoE. I think it's correct to assume that TE can also be related to and Awakened Eva, but if I look at it from a plot outlook then I kinda get the feeling that there's something beyond that. Maybe they're refering to an Eva that's already going through Human Instrumentality. I think Unit-01 would've been the TE had Kaworu not stopped it mid transformation, but all it has now is its full potential brought out. Plus there's also the theory about awakening 4 Evas to represent the 4 adams. I said this in another thread, but maybe awakening 4 evas and then combining their powers to form a power close to Adam in a single form.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:19 pm A True Evangelion is probably something that can function as a Seed of Life or some shit.
